recommendations.title: The Bridge at Remagen
recommendations.overview: In March of 1945, as the War in Europe is coming to a close, fighting erupts between German and American troops at the last remaining bridgehead across the Rhine.

recommendations.title: The Blue Max
recommendations.overview: A young pilot in the German air force of 1918, disliked as lower-class and unchivalrous, tries ambitiously to earn the medal offered for 20 kills.

recommendations.title: King Kong
recommendations.overview: An oil company expedition disturbs the peace of a giant ape and brings him back to New York to exploit him.

recommendations.title: The Towering Inferno
recommendations.overview: At the opening party of a colossal—but poorly constructed—skyscraper, a massive fire breaks out, threatening to destroy the tower and everyone in it.

recommendations.title: Sheena
recommendations.overview: Sheena's parents are killed while on Safari. She is raised by the mystical witch woman of an African tribe. When her foster mother is framed for the murder of a political leader, Sheena and a newsman, Vic Casey, are forced to flee while pursued by th

recommendations.title: King Kong Lives
recommendations.overview: After falling from the Twin Towers, Kong lies in a coma for ten years. When his heart begins to fail, scientists engineer an artificial heart, and a giant female ape is captured to serve as a source for a blood transfusion. When Kong awakens followin

recommendations.title: Where the Crawdads Sing
recommendations.overview: Abandoned by her family, Kya raises herself all alone in the marshes outside of her small town. When her former boyfriend is found dead, Kya is instantly branded by the local townspeople and law enforcement as the prime suspect for his murder.

recommendations.title: Basic Instinct
recommendations.overview: Catherine, a novelist with an insatiable sexual appetite, becomes a prime suspect when her boyfriend is brutally murdered -- a crime she had described in her latest story.

recommendations.title: Jagged Edge
recommendations.overview: After a wealthy heiress is murdered in her beach house, her devastated husband becomes the prime suspect. He hires a lawyer who hasn’t taken a criminal case in years, and as they work together, a complicated romance develops amidst the trial.

recommendations.title: Bitter Moon
recommendations.overview: A passenger on a cruise ship develops an irresistible infatuation with an eccentric paraplegic's wife.
